sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Expeditors International stock hits all-time high at 148.4 USD
feed.summary: Expeditors International's stock reached an all-time high of $148.4 USD, driven by strong demand for its logistics services, a share buyback program, and a consistent dividend yield. Despite appearing overvalued by InvestingPro analysis, recent strong Q3 earnings and favorable analyst upgrades from Goldman Sachs, Stifel, BofA Securities, and UBS indicate positive sentiment and continued financial strength for the company.

feed.title: Citizens Financial Group stock hits 52-week high at 55.25 USD
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group (CFG) stock has reached a new 52-week high of $55.25, demonstrating significant growth with a 21.27% 1-year return and a 36.26% gain over six months. The company exhibits strong financial health, a P/E ratio of 15.46, a PEG ratio of 0.37, and a 3.37% dividend yield, having maintained dividends for 12 consecutive years. Recent Q3 2025 earnings surpassed expectations, and TD Cowen maintained a Buy rating with a $75 price target.

feed.title: Deere & Company announces $1.62 quarterly dividend
feed.summary: Deere & Company declared a quarterly dividend of $1.62 per share, payable on February 9, 2026, to stockholders of record as of December 31, 2025. The company, with a market capitalization of $128.75 billion, faces mixed analyst ratings and concerns over the core U.S. agricultural market despite some segments showing growth. Analysts have issued varying price targets following the company's recent earnings report, highlighting different perspectives on its future performance.

feed.title: W.R. Berkley Corp. stock underperforms Monday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: W.R. Berkley Corp. (WRB) stock experienced a drop of 1.48% on Monday, closing at $82.78, which underperformed the S&P 500's gain of 0.20%. This decline also put the company behind its competitors, including Chubb Ltd. (CB) and Travelers Cos. Inc. (TRV), which saw increases. The stock traded between $82.73 and $84.09 during the session, and its 52-week range is $67.58 to $87.89.

feed.title: VICI PROPERTIES INC. CMN - Ro Khanna Congressional Trade on Oct. 07, 2025
feed.summary: This article details a congressional stock trade made by Representative Ro Khanna involving VICI Properties Inc. on October 7, 2025. The transaction was a purchase with an amount between $1,001 and $15,000. It also provides performance metrics for VICI stock and SPY since the trade date.

feed.title: VICI Properties (NYSE:VICI) Stock Price
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive overview of VICI Properties (NYSE:VICI), highlighting its current stock price, fair value, and performance metrics. It also includes key financial details, recent news, and a description of the company's real estate portfolio and business strategy, emphasizing its focus on experiential assets.

feed.title: Packaging Corp to shutter Washington facility, cutting 200 jobs and incurring $205 million charge
feed.summary: Packaging Corp of America announced it will close its Wallula, Washington containerboard mill and sack paper operations by mid-2024, affecting 200 employees. This closure is expected to result in a non-cash charge of approximately $205 million in Q4 2023, primarily related to asset impairment. The company aims to optimize its mill system and fiber consumption while reducing capital expenditures.

feed.title: Marsh & McLennan Stock: Is MMC Underperforming the Financial Sector?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Marsh & McLennan (MMC) stock performance, noting its recent underperformance compared to the broader financial sector and S&P 500. It details key financial metrics such as net income, earnings growth, and dividend trends, while also providing technical analysis on price movements and analyst ratings. The report suggests MMC might be a value play given its robust fundamentals despite recent market struggles.

feed.title: What Are Wall Street Analysts’ Target Price for KeyCorp Stock?
feed.summary: This article examines Wall Street analysts' target prices for KeyCorp (KEY) stock, revealing a consensus target of $13.43 and varied individual price targets. It also reviews recent KeyCorp performance, dividend history, and insider transaction trends, noting that the stock has seen a 6.27% increase year-to-date but a significant decline over the past 52 weeks. The analysis also highlights recent analyst ratings and the impact of sector-wide credit conditions on bank stocks.

feed.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING Eversource Energy Declares Common Dividend
feed.summary: Eversource Energy issued a correction to its prior dividend announcement, updating the record date for its quarterly common dividend. The company's Board of Trustees approved a dividend of $0.7525 per share, payable on December 31, 2025, to shareholders of record as of December 17, 2025. Eversource, recognized as a national leader in corporate citizenship and energy efficiency, serves approximately 4.6 million customers across Connecticut, Massachusetts, and New Hampshire.

feed.title: Caesars Entertainment Board Member Don Kornstein Resigns
feed.summary: Don R. Kornstein will resign from the Board of Caesars Entertainment on December 31, 2025. His resignation is not due to any disagreement with the company. Analysts currently rate CZR stock as a Buy with a $39.00 price target, although Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, views it as Neutral due to financial challenges like high leverage and profitability issues.

feed.title: A Key Citi Exec Leaves as the Bank Overhauls Its Wealth Business
feed.summary: A chief operating officer of Citigroup's wealth management division is departing the bank after two decades with the company. This leadership change is the latest in a series of developments as Citi undergoes a significant overhaul of its wealth business.

feed.title: Fed rate-cut odds climb on softer-than-expected ADP data
feed.summary: Odds for a Federal Reserve rate cut increased after November's ADP private payroll data showed an unexpected contraction of 32,000 jobs, falling short of expectations. This prompted investors to price in a higher probability of a 25 basis-point cut at the December FOMC meeting, despite the ISM services PMI showing continued resilience in the US services sector. Other economic news included Australia's Q3 GDP decelerating and a modest build in US crude inventories.

feed.title: Cadence Design Systems Insider Sold Shares Worth $312,640, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: An insider at Cadence Design Systems sold shares valued at $312,640, as reported in a recent SEC filing. This transaction was published on December 3, 2025. The article also provides recent news and company information for Cadence Design Systems.

feed.title: Equinix CFO Keith Taylor Announces 2026 Retirement
feed.summary: Equinix (EQIX) CFO Keith Taylor plans to retire in 2026 after 27 years with the company, having played a key role in its growth to a Fortune 500 company with over $9 billion in annualized revenue. He will remain CFO until a successor is appointed and then serve as a Special Advisor to ensure a smooth transition. The company has initiated a search for a new CFO, considering both internal and external candidates.

feed.title: State of ASPM 2025: Key Trends & Emerging Threats
feed.summary: This article forecasts the key trends and emerging threats in Application Security Posture Management (ASPM) for 2025. It examines the market's rapid evolution, driven by cloud-native development and software supply chain vulnerabilities, emphasizing the critical role of AI-native ASPM, DevSecOps integration, and platform consolidation in addressing complex security challenges. The article also highlights regulatory mandates and the increasing sophistication of attacks as major drivers for ASPM adoption and innovation.

feed.title: Franklin Resources reports $1.67 trillion assets under management in November
feed.summary: Franklin Resources (NYSE: BEN) reported preliminary assets under management of $1.67 trillion as of November 30, 2025, a slight decrease from $1.68 trillion at October 31, 2025. The company experienced flat long-term flows, with Western Asset Management contributing to net outflows, while Franklin Templeton recorded long-term net inflows. Asset changes were largely influenced by positive market performance offsetting net outflows across various asset classes.

feed.title: Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR) sets Dec. 18, 2025 redemption for €1.075B 2.500% 2026 notes
feed.summary: Digital Realty announced that its indirect finance subsidiary, Digital Euro Finco, LLC, will redeem all outstanding €1.075 billion 2.500% Guaranteed Notes due 2026 on December 18, 2025. The redemption will be at par plus accrued and unpaid interest. This action removes €1.075 billion of fixed-rate debt from the company's outstanding liabilities.

feed.title: CBOE reports record index options trading in november
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets Inc. (CBOE) reported record trading volumes for its proprietary index options suite in November 2025, with average daily volume reaching 5.9 million contracts. The company also saw significant increases in multi-listed options, U.S. equities trading, foreign exchange trading, and futures trading compared to the previous year. These figures highlight strong performance across CBOE's global business lines.

feed.title: Franklin Resources, Inc. Announces Preliminary Month-End Assets Under Management
feed.summary: Franklin Resources, Inc. (Franklin Templeton) reported preliminary month-end assets under management (AUM) of $1.67 trillion at November 30, 2025, a slight decrease from $1.68 trillion at October 31, 2025. The preliminary AUM reflected flat long-term flows, including $1 billion of long-term net outflows at Western Asset Management, and the positive impact of markets. Excluding Western Asset Management, preliminary long-term net inflows were $1 billion.

feed.title: Cboe Global Markets Reports Trading Volume for November 2025
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets reported its November 2025 trading volume statistics, highlighting significant growth in multi-listed options and index options, including new records for S&P 500 Index (SPX) options. The report details Average Daily Trading Volume (ADV) across various business segments, such as U.S. equities, European equities, and global FX, showcasing year-over-year increases in most categories. Additionally, it notes the setting of a new Cboe SEF (Swap Execution Facility) Non-Deliverable Forwards average daily notional value record for Global FX.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Insider Sold Shares Worth $8,154,131, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: A Thermo Fisher Scientific insider sold shares valued at $8,154,131, according to a recent SEC filing. This transaction follows other recent sales by insiders and announcements regarding share repurchases and dividends. The company continues to make strategic moves including expanding Bioprocess Design Centers in Asia and receiving FDA approvals for new diagnostic tools.

feed.title: Charles River Laboratories (CRL) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Charles River Laboratories (CRL) jumped 6.1% after the company provided an encouraging business update at an investor conference, highlighting positive demand trends in its Discovery and Safety Assessment (DSA) segment. The company reported that its net book-to-bill ratio has risen each month since the start of the third fiscal quarter, leading to optimism about upward trends despite potential short-term holiday seasonality. CRL shares closed at $184.69, reflecting a 5.7% increase, and are trading near their 52-week high.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Recruits $6.3 Billion Team From UBS
feed.summary: Wells Fargo Advisors successfully recruited the Hingham Street Partners team from rival UBS. This significant move brings a team that managed $6.3 billion in client assets to Wells Fargo's Private Client Group. The Hingham Street Partners team includes 16 advisors and 16 support staff and joined Wells Fargo's Boston office on December 2.

feed.title: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Inc.'s stock ended Friday up 0.44% to $390.96, outperforming competitors like Eli Lilly and Co. and Johnson & Johnson. The stock also traded above its 52-week average volume and closed $5.90 below its 52-week high, indicating a strong trading day amidst overall market gains.

feed.title: S&P 500 Gains and Losses Today: Paramount and Netflix Slide; Microchip Technology Surges on Strong Guidance
feed.summary: Microchip Technology surged on strong guidance, boosting the S&P 500, while Paramount Skydance and Netflix shares fell due to competition for Warner Bros. Discovery. Lower private-sector payroll data also increased expectations for a Federal Reserve rate cut. Other notable movers included Vertex Pharmaceuticals, Delta Airlines, and Alexandria Real Estate Equities.

feed.title: Uber launches robotaxis in Dallas
feed.summary: Uber has launched robotaxis in Dallas, making Avride robotaxis available to customers in a 9 square mile area. The service allows customers to choose robotaxis for UberX, Uber Comfort, and Uber Comfort Electric rides, with plans for future expansion. This move follows previous instances of concern and calls for regulation regarding robotaxi rollouts in other cities like Austin and San Francisco.

feed.title: Goldman Is Pitching a Risky $500 Million Deal to Finance Shareholder Payout
feed.summary: A Canadian benefits provider owned by Goldman Sachs Group Inc. is seeking approximately $500 million from private credit lenders. This financing, in the form of a payment-in-kind (PIK) note tied to a holding company, is intended to fund a payout to shareholders. The structure allows the company to defer paying interest in cash.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $1.05 per Share, Payable Jan. 16 to Holders of Record on Dec. 17
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $1.05 per share. This dividend is payable on January 16 to shareholders of record as of December 17. The firm, specializing in residential real estate assets, also had several recent analyst ratings adjustments on its stock.

feed.title: DSPM Market Size: 2025 Guide
feed.summary: The DSPM market is experiencing explosive growth, with valuations projected between $415 million and $2 billion in 2025, driven by accelerated cloud migration, increasing data breaches, and stringent regulatory compliance. Palo Alto Networks has carved out a significant market position through strategic acquisitions and integrated DPCM capabilities within its Cortex Cloud platform. The market is forecasted for sustained expansion, propelled by AI and machine learning data protection needs, edge computing, and evolving data regulations.

feed.title: HD Investors Have Opportunity to Join The Home Depot, Inc. Fraud Investigation with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm is investigating claims on behalf of investors of The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE: HD) for alleged violations of securities laws. This investigation follows Home Depot's announcement of its Q3 2025 financial results, where the company missed sales forecasts and stated that shares fell by more than 6% on the same day. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to contact the Schall Law Firm to discuss their rights.

feed.title: Equinix CFO Keith Taylor to retire in 2026 after 27 years
feed.summary: Equinix Inc. announced that CFO Keith Taylor will retire in 2026 after 27 years with the company. Taylor joined Equinix in 1999 and was instrumental in its growth from a startup to a global leader, overseeing its financial strategy through its IPO and beyond. The company has begun a search for his successor and Taylor will remain CFO until a new candidate is selected, then will serve as a Special Advisor for about a year to ensure a smooth transition.

feed.title: Transcript : Archer-Daniels-Midland Company Presents at Goldman Sachs Industrials and Materials Conference 2025, Dec-03-2025 03
feed.summary: This article is a transcript from Archer-Daniels-Midland Company's presentation at the Goldman Sachs Industrials and Materials Conference on December 3, 2025, at 3:30 PM EST. The full transcript of the presentation is reserved for subscribers. The article also provides recent news and financial data related to Archer-Daniels-Midland Company, including stock performance, earnings reports, and analyst ratings.

feed.title: Packaging Corp. of America Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $1.25 a Share, Payable Jan. 14 to Holders of Record on Dec. 15
feed.summary: Packaging Corp. of America announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $1.25 per share. The dividend is payable on January 14 to shareholders of record as of December 15. The article also includes recent analyst rating adjustments and earnings reports for the company.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land Corp. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land Corp. (TPL) stock significantly outperformed its competitors on a strong trading day, gaining 5.79% to reach $914.72. This rise occurred during a favorable market session where both the S&P 500 Index and the Dow Jones Industrial Average also saw increases. This marks the second consecutive day of gains for Texas Pacific Land Corp.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities Inc. stock underperforms Wednesday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities Inc. (ARE) stock fell by 10.05% on Wednesday, closing at $48.42, despite an overall positive day for the broader stock market, with both the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average seeing gains. The company's stock is now trading 55.26% below its 52-week high of $108.22, which was reached on December 4th. This underperformance occurred on a day when major indices, such as the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average, recorded increases.

feed.title: ON Semiconductor Corp. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor Corp. (ON) saw a significant stock increase of 11.01% to $57.15 on Wednesday, marking its eighth consecutive day of gains. This performance outpaced the broader market, which also experienced a positive trading session with the S&P 500 Index rising 0.30% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising 0.86%. The strong trading day for ON Semiconductor Corp. indicates robust investor confidence in the company.

feed.title: Live Nation Entertainment Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Live Nation Entertainment Inc. (LYV) stock rose 5.81% to $136.01 on Wednesday, outperforming competitors and marking a positive trading session. This increase broke a two-day losing streak for the company's shares. The rise occurred on a day when the broader stock market, including the S&P 500 Index and the Dow Jones Industrial Average, also experienced gains.

feed.title: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conference
feed.summary: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. announced its participation in the Goldman Sachs Industrials & Materials Conference 2025. The company will present on Thursday, December 4, 2025, at 8:00 am ET, with a live webcast and replay available on its investor relations website. This presentation offers investors insight into CF Industries' strategy to decarbonize its ammonia production and provide clean energy solutions globally.

feed.title: Medtronic (NYSE: MDT) gains FDA clearance for Hugo RAS in 230,000-case urology market
feed.summary: Medtronic (NYSE: MDT) has received FDA clearance for its Hugo™ robotic-assisted surgery (RAS) system for minimally invasive urologic procedures such as prostatectomy, nephrectomy, and cystectomy. These procedures account for approximately 230,000 surgeries annually in the U.S. The clearance follows a successful Expand URO IDE study, with Medtronic planning a purposeful U.S. launch and aiming for broader specialty indications in the future.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial, Inc. Declares Increased Quarterly Dividend and $2 Billion Share Repurchase Authorization
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial, Inc. announced an 8% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.54 per share and authorized a new $2 billion share repurchase program. This replaces a previous $1.5 billion authorization and reflects the company's commitment to returning value to shareholders, even while an explicit expiration date for repurchases is not fixed. The firm also declared a dividend for its Series B Preferred Stock, which will be redeemed on January 2, 2026.

feed.title: Eversource Energy declares quarterly dividend of $0.7525 per share By Investing.com
feed.summary: Eversource Energy announced a quarterly dividend of $0.7525 per share payable on December 31, 2025. This declaration follows recent regulatory challenges, including the rejection of its $1.6 billion Aquarion Water Company sale, which led to revised analyst ratings and price target adjustments from Scotiabank, Jefferies, and Mizuho. Despite the setback, Eversource reaffirmed its 2025 non-GAAP earnings guidance and its commitment to energy efficiency and clean energy initiatives.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley's Co-Head of Investment Banking Assomull Expects More Financial M&A
feed.summary: Mo Assomull, Morgan Stanley's co-head of investment banking, anticipates a strong deals pipeline for the upcoming year, encompassing M&A and IPO transactions. He also noted that increased demand for IPOs has made "dual track" deals, which involve a company seeking either a sale or a public listing, more prevalent. This outlook was shared at the Reuters Next conference.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics buys Texas Pacific Land (TPL) share valued at $869
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a significant owner of Texas Pacific Land Corp (NYSE:TPL), purchased 1 share of the company's common stock for $869.18 per share. This transaction increases their direct ownership to 1,162,577 shares. Despite recent price weakness and a Q3 2025 earnings miss, TPL maintains strong gross profit margins and a consistent dividend yield, while also announcing a three-for-one stock split and receiving an "Overweight" rating from KeyBanc.

feed.title: U.S. Markets Closed Up Wednesday; Microchip Technology Topped Leaders
feed.summary: U.S. stock indexes concluded Wednesday with gains, led by Microchip Technology. The article states that the [unnamed index 1] increased by 0.86%, the [unnamed index 2] rose by 0.30%, and the [unnamed index 3] gained 0.17%.

feed.title: Everest Announces Key Leadership Appointments
feed.summary: Everest Group, Ltd. announced the appointments of Katy Bradica as Group Chief Actuary and Attila Kerényi as Group Chief Risk Officer, both effective early 2026. These leadership additions are intended to strengthen the company's underwriting excellence and risk management, enhancing its competitive position and long-term shareholder value. The article highlights their extensive experience in actuarial science and risk management within global financial services.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Dividend
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) has declared a fourth-quarter cash dividend of $1.05 per share, payable on January 16, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 17, 2025. The real estate company, an S&P 500 member, owns and operates 171 properties with 58,437 apartment homes across the United States. Camden has also been recognized for 18 consecutive years by FORTUNE magazine as one of the 100 Best Companies to Work For®.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoran Inc. (FCX) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay & Murray LLP has announced a securities fraud class-action lawsuit against Freeport-McMoran Inc. (FCX), inviting shareholders who suffered losses between February 15, 2022, and September 24, 2025, to participate. The lawsuit alleges that Freeport failed to adequately ensure safety at its Grasberg Block Cave mine in Indonesia, leading to undisclosed risks of regulatory, litigation, and reputational damage. Shareholders have until January 12, 2026, to apply to be lead plaintiff in the case.

feed.title: ADP National Employment Report: Private Sector Employment Shed 32,000 Jobs in November; Annual Pay Was Up 4.4%
feed.summary: The ADP National Employment Report for November 2025 revealed a decrease of 32,000 private sector jobs, alongside a 4.4% year-over-year increase in annual pay. This slowdown in hiring was broad-based and notably led by a pullback in small businesses, reflecting cautious consumers and an uncertain macroeconomic environment. The report also highlights weak hiring in sectors like manufacturing, professional and business services, information, and construction, while pay growth for job-stayers and job-changers saw a slight deceleration.

feed.title: Invesco Ltd. to Participate in the Goldman Sachs 2025 Financial Services Conference
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. announced its participation in the Goldman Sachs 2025 Financial Services Conference. Andrew Schlossberg, President and CEO, and Allison Dukes, CFO, will host a fireside chat on December 9, 2025. A live audio webcast and replay will be available on Invesco's Investor Relations website.
